# ITOHI — Andrius Mikonis

> Hardware builds, AI systems, and defence tech experiments. Embedded firmware, ESP32, neural nets, WiFi CSI, open-source projects.

## About
- Author: Andrius Mikonis, software and AI consultant based in Vilnius, Lithuania
- Company: Mikonis Artisan MB
- Expertise: embedded systems, firmware, machine learning, defence tech prototyping, AI helpers

## Key content
- /blog/ — technical build logs and experiments
- /esp-motion, /esp-reflow, /esp-weather — open hardware projects
- /about/me — full background
